profile_backing.source: br ready --json was empty; continued from the fresh profiler-evident fj-lax linalg row after pass54
profile_backing.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-gemm-pass55-baseline-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1

lever.name: rayon row-parallel GEMM
lever.description: For large valid dense GEMM inputs, attempted to split result rows across Rayon workers while each row retained the existing i-k-j loop and each output cell retained ascending-k accumulation.

alien_primitive.reason: Prior row-block/register-only/transposed-RHS micro-levers failed, triggering a structurally different row-parallel scheduling attempt.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Output storage remained row-major; rows are independent and written to disjoint result chunks.
isomorphism_proof.per_cell_order: Inside each row, the candidate used the same l=0..k-1 loop as the current i-k-j kernel, so every cell saw the same multiplication/addition sequence.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No per-cell reassociation, partial-sum merge, vector reduction, or mixed precision was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.errors: Candidate guarded parallel execution to valid dense slice lengths; malformed slice behavior stayed on the existing sequential indexing path.

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-gemm-pass55-test-20260603 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.details: 3 tests passed in candidate state, including matmul_2d_parallel_threshold_bit_identical_to_ijk
Reported pre-existing formatting diffs in crates/fj-lax/src/lib.rs and crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs; not touched for this pass.

rebench.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-gemm-pass55-after-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --sample-size 30 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1
rebench.outliers: 6/30; 2 low mild, 1 high mild, 3 high severe

next_primitive.target: cache-size KC blocking or recursive/cache-oblivious GEMM
next_primitive.reason: Coarse row parallelism did not improve the same-worker Criterion row and introduced high variance. The next deeper primitive should improve single-thread locality and instruction scheduling before adding parallelism, while preserving per-cell ascending-k order.
